chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Civil Revision Application No. 50 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No. 3671/2025 (Exemption). 2. For hearing of Main Case 20.05.2025 Mr. Tahir Rahim, Advocate for the Applicant..-.-.-.-.-. Muhammad Jaffer Raza, J:- Learned counsel for the Applicant has impugned the order dated 13.02.2025 passed in Civil Transfer Application No.09/2025 on an application under Section 24 CPC, whereby the Civil Transfer Application was filed by the Applicant being the Plaintiff in Defamation Suit No.143/2024. The learned counsel has stated that his application for transfer ought to have been allowed as the "attitude" of the learned presiding officer, accodring to him, can only be classified as “harsh” and “biased”. Further learned counsel for the Applicant has invited my attention to the diary sheet of 18.12.2024 in which a warning was given to the Applicant to appear in the witness box and examine herself as the Plaintiff. I have heard the learned counsel and perused the record. The record reflects that the learned presiding officer of the trial court is making an attempt to expedite the matter and no "bias" is apparent from the record. I do not wish to make any other observation in this regard as the same may influence the case of the respective parties. In light of the above I do not find any illegality and infirmity which requires any interference in the judgment passed by the Courts below. Accordingly, the instant Civil Revision Application along with pending application is dismissed in limine, with no order as to costs. JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi “PA”
